Uses of Package
com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

  • Packages that use com.nexacro.java.xapi.data 
    Package Description
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.data
    Define X-API Data Structure.
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx
    Conduct X-API Data Communication.
    com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl  
  • Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.data used by com.nexacro.java.xapi.data 
    Class and Description
    ColumnHeader
    Saves properties for DataSet column.
    ConstantColumnHeader
    ColumnHeader with DataSet constant value(value).
    DataSet
    Consist of column and row, and saves 2 dimensional data.
    DataSetDataConverter
    Transform DataSet data to other type data.
    DataSetEvent
    EventObject indicating DataSet structure or data modification.
    DataSetList
    saves DataSet with 2 dimensional data.
    DataSetListener
    EventListener managing data or structure modification of DataSet.
    PlatformData
    it is the tup data of X-API, and a basic unit of data communication or data movement. i.e. when transmitting/receiving server and data, or delivering data between classes, conduct by using PlatformData.
    Variable
    indicate variable saving data, and consist of Identifier(name) and value.
    VariableDataConverter
    transform Variable data to other type data.
    VariableList
    save Variable with singular data.
  • Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.data used by com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx 
    Class and Description
    DataSet
    Consist of column and row, and saves 2 dimensional data.
    PlatformData
    it is the tup data of X-API, and a basic unit of data communication or data movement. i.e. when transmitting/receiving server and data, or delivering data between classes, conduct by using PlatformData.
    Variable
    indicate variable saving data, and consist of Identifier(name) and value.
  • Classes in com.nexacro.java.xapi.data used by com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl 
    Class and Description
    ColumnHeader
    Saves properties for DataSet column.
    ConstantColumnHeader
    ColumnHeader with DataSet constant value(value).
    DataSet
    Consist of column and row, and saves 2 dimensional data.
    DataSetList
    saves DataSet with 2 dimensional data.
    PlatformData
    it is the tup data of X-API, and a basic unit of data communication or data movement. i.e. when transmitting/receiving server and data, or delivering data between classes, conduct by using PlatformData.
    Variable
    indicate variable saving data, and consist of Identifier(name) and value.
    VariableList
    save Variable with singular data.
